Our Service Agreement

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 27, 2026

Effective: April 27, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing our website or engaging our cleaning services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services or website.

2. Services Provided

Ana Lemes Cleaning provides professional residential and commercial cleaning services in Massachusetts, including but not limited to: house cleaning, apartment cleaning, office cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/out cleaning, and post-construction cleaning.

3. Service Agreement & Scheduling

  • All services are subject to availability and must be booked in advance
  • We reserve the right to refuse service at our discretion
  • Service areas are limited to Massachusetts and surrounding regions
  • You must provide safe and reasonable access to the property at the scheduled time

4. Cancellation Policy

We require at least 24 hours advance notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Cancellations made with less than 24 hours notice may be subject to a cancellation fee of up to 50% of the quoted service price.

5. Payment Terms

Payment is due upon completion of service unless otherwise agreed in writing. We accept cash, check, and major digital payment methods. Returned checks are subject to a $35 fee.

6. Satisfaction Guarantee

Your satisfaction is our priority. If you are not satisfied with any aspect of our service, please notify us within 24 hours of service completion. We will return to address the issue at no additional charge.

7. Limitation of Liability

Ana Lemes Cleaning carries liability insurance. In the event of accidental damage caused by our team, please notify us within 48 hours. Our liability is limited to the direct cost of repair or replacement of damaged items, not to exceed the total value of the service rendered.

We are not responsible for pre-existing damage, items of extraordinary value left accessible, or damage resulting from conditions not disclosed prior to service.

8. Client Responsibilities

  • Secure pets and remove hazards before our team arrives
  • Disclose any special conditions, allergies, or sensitivities relevant to cleaning products
  • Provide accurate information about property size and condition when requesting a quote
  • Ensure safe working conditions for our team

9. Privacy

Your use of our website is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Massachusetts.

11. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

12. Contact

For questions about these Terms:
